title: When the Benford law must fail: reproducibility code
description: Code and documentation reproducing every computed value in Bustillos and Leiva, "When the Benford law must fail: A corrected first-digit test for power-law distributions", Chilean Journal of Statistics, 2026. Includes the power-law first-digit law P_k, the joint (k, phi) minimum-chi-squared estimator (k>=1), the TOST equivalence decision, the parametric/nonparametric bootstrap, and the recomputation of the forensic table from public data.

creators.name: Leiva, Víctor
creators.affiliation: Pontificia Universidad Católica de Valparaíso, Chile
